title: Quadratic Formula
aria_label: x equals negative b, plus or minus the square root of, b squared minus 4 a c, all divided by 2 a
notes: The quadratic formula solves any quadratic equation in standard form ax² + bx + c = 0.
The ± means there are potentially two solutions — one with + and one with −.
Always identify a, b, and c carefully before substituting. Watch signs.
The expression under the radical, b² − 4ac, is the discriminant. It tells you how many real solutions exist.
If the discriminant is negative, there are no real solutions (the parabola doesn't cross the x-axis).

examples.description: Solve x² − 5x + 6 = 0 using the quadratic formula.

applications: Solving any quadratic equation when factoring is not obvious or possible.
Finding the x-intercepts of any parabola.
Calculating time values in physics problems involving height and gravity.

es.title: Fórmula Cuadrática
notes: La fórmula cuadrática resuelve cualquier ecuación cuadrática en forma estándar ax² + bx + c = 0.
El ± significa que hay potencialmente dos soluciones — una con + y otra con −.
Siempre identifica a, b y c con cuidado antes de sustituir. Vigila los signos.
La expresión bajo el radical, b² − 4ac, es el discriminante. Indica cuántas soluciones reales existen.
Si el discriminante es negativo, no hay soluciones reales.

examples.description: Resuelve x² − 5x + 6 = 0 usando la fórmula cuadrática.

ht.title: Fòmil Kwadratik
notes: Fòmil kwadratik la rezoud nenpòt ekwasyon kwadratik nan fòm estanda ax² + bx + c = 0.
± vle di gen potansyèlman de solisyon — youn ak + ak youn ak −.
Toujou idantifye a, b, ak c avèk anpil swen anvan ou substitye. Veye siy yo.
Ekspresyon anba radikal la, b² − 4ac, se diskriminan an. Li di ou konbyen solisyon reyèl ki egziste.
Si diskriminan an negatif, pa gen solisyon reyèl.

examples.description: Rezoud x² − 5x + 6 = 0 lè w itilize fòmil kwadratik la.
